Part.Source:
If &parNfsCod = 0 For Each Order tmpNFeCod Where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNfeCod
&tmpNfeFatFilCod = tmpNfeFatFilCod &tmpNfeArqXml = tmpNfeArqXml &tmpLctCod = tmpLctCod &tmpImpEntSai = tmpImpEntSai &tmpNfeNum = tmpNfeNum &tmpNfeProTer = tmpNfeProTer &tmpNfeDtaEms = tmpNfeDtaEms &tmpNfeDtaDsp = tmpNfeDtaDsp &tmpEmixCod = tmpEmixCod &tmpEmixNom = tmpEmixNom &tmpDestxCod = tmpDestxCod &tmpDestxNom = tmpDestxNom &tmpNfeChv = tmpNfeChv
tmpStsNF = 'S' Exit EndFor
LeituraXmlNFSeNacional.Call(&tmpNfeArqXml, '', &OutXmlCompNFse_LongVarchar) &sdtNFSeNacional.FromXml(&OutXmlCompNFse_LongVarchar) &NfsNum = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.nDFSe) if &NfsNum <= 0 //NFSe Nacional Valida LeituraXmlNFSe.Call(&tmpNfeArqXml, '', &OutXmlCompNFse_LongVarchar, &IsGravar) &CompNFSe.FromXml(&OutXmlCompNFse_LongVarchar) Endif
Do CAse CAse &NfsNum > 0 //NFSe Nacional Valida &NFsTipNF = 'S' //Nacional Endcase
&NfsCod = UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Udp(domParCod.NOTAFISCALSERVICO, &EmpCod, 0) //AGORA é ZERO &parNfsCod = &NfsCod
New EmpCod = &EmpCod
NfsCod = &NfsCod
NfsFilCod = &tmpNfeFatFilCod NfsPedCod = &NfsPedCod NfsPedFilCod = &NfsPedFilCod NfsTipNF = &NFsTipNF
//Nfspedcod NfsNum = &tmpNfeNum if &NFsTipNF = 'S' NfsTipEmi.FromString(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.tpEmit) NfsNumRps = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.nDPS) Else NfsNumRps = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Rps.IdentificacaoRps.Numero) Endif
//Nfsser
NfsSts = Status_NFe.Digitando NfsProTer = &tmpNfeProTer
NfsDtaEms = &tmpNfeDtaEms NfsDtaFat = &tmpNfeDtaDsp
NfsLctCod = &tmpLctCod If &tmpImpEntSai = '1' NfsEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida Else NfsEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada EndIF
//DESTINATARIO if &tmpNfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS NfsCliCod = &tmpEmixCod NfsCliRaz = &tmpEmixNom.Trim()
if &NFsTipNF = 'S' &NfeCliCpf = &SdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.emit.CPF validaCpfCnpj.Call(&NfeCliCpf, &Erro, 'N') NfsCliCPF = &NfeCliCpf
&NfeCliCnpj = &SdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.emit.CNPJ validaCpfCnpj.Call(&NfeCliCnpj, &Erro, 'N') NfsCliCnpj = &NfeCliCnpj
if NfsCliCnpj.IsEmpty() NfsCliTipPes = TipoPessoa.FISICA Else NfsCliTipPes = TipoPessoa.JURIDICA EndIF
NfsCliFonNum = &SdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.emit.fone NfsCliInsMun = &SdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.emit.IM
NfsCliLog = &SdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.emit.enderNac.xLgr NfsCliNro = &SdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.emit.enderNac.nro NfsCliBai = &SdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.emit.enderNac.xBairro NfsCliCep = &SdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.emit.enderNac.CEP
&NfsCliCidCod = 0 &CidIbge = val(&SdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.emit.enderNac.cMun) do 'loadCidade' NfsCliCidCod = &NfsCliCidCod
NfsCliCidIbge = &CidIbge NfsCliCidNom = &NfsCliCidNom //PedCliEntCidNom NfsCliCidUfCod = &NfsCliCidUF Endif Else if &NFsTipNF = 'S' NfsCliCod = &tmpDestxCod NfsCliRaz = &tmpDestxNom.Trim()
&NfeCliCpf = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.dpS.infDPS.toma.CPF validaCpfCnpj.Call(&NfeCliCpf, &Erro, 'N') NfsCliCPF = &NfeCliCpf
&NfeCliCnpj = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.dpS.infDPS.toma.CNPJ validaCpfCnpj.Call(&NfeCliCnpj, &Erro, 'N') NfsCliCnpj = &NfeCliCnpj
if NfsCliCnpj.IsEmpty() NfsCliTipPes = TipoPessoa.FISICA Else NfsCliTipPes = TipoPessoa.JURIDICA EndIF
NfsCliFonNum = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.dpS.infDPS.toma.fone //NfsCliInsEst = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.InscricaoEstadual NfsCliInsMun = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.dpS.infDPS.toma.IM
NfsCliLog = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.dpS.infDPS.toma.end.xLgr NfsCliNro = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.dpS.infDPS.toma.end.nro NfsCliBai = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.dpS.infDPS.toma.end.xBairro NfsCliCep = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.dpS.infDPS.toma.end.endNac.CEP
&NfsCliCidCod = 0 &CidIbge = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.dpS.infDPS.toma.end.endNac.cMun) do 'loadCidade' NfsCliCidCod = &NfsCliCidCod
NfsCliCidIbge = &CidIbge NfsCliCidNom = &NfsCliCidNom //PedCliEntCidNom NfsCliCidUfCod = &NfsCliCidUF Else NfsCliCod = &tmpDestxCod NfsCliRaz = &tmpDestxNom.Trim()
&NfeCliCpf = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.IdentificacaoTomador.CpfCnpj.Cpf validaCpfCnpj.Call(&NfeCliCpf, &Erro, 'N') NfsCliCPF = &NfeCliCpf
&NfeCliCnpj = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.IdentificacaoTomador.CpfCnpj.CNPJ validaCpfCnpj.Call(&NfeCliCnpj, &Erro, 'N') NfsCliCnpj = &NfeCliCnpj
if NfsCliCnpj.IsEmpty() NfsCliTipPes = TipoPessoa.FISICA Else NfsCliTipPes = TipoPessoa.JURIDICA EndIF
NfsCliFonNum = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.Contato.Telefone NfsCliInsEst = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.InscricaoEstadual
NfsCliLog = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.Endereco.Endereco.ToUpper() NfsCliNro = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.Endereco.Numero.ToUpper() NfsCliBai = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.Endereco.Bairro.ToUpper() NfsCliCep = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.Endereco.Cep.ToUpper()
&NfsCliCidCod = 0 &CidIbge = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.Endereco.CodigoMunicipio) do 'loadCidade' NfsCliCidCod = &NfsCliCidCod
NfsCliCidIbge = &CidIbge NfsCliCidNom = &NfsCliCidNom //PedCliEntCidNom NfsCliCidUfCod = &NfsCliCidUF Endif EndIF
if &NFsTipNF = 'S'
NfsPerISS = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.valores.pAliqAplic) NfsTotISS = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.valores.vISSQN)
&ServicoMoeda = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.vServPrest.vServ) &DescontoMoeda = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.vDescCondIncond.vDescIncond) &TotalBaseCalculo = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.valores.vBC)
NfsPerCofins = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.trib.tribFed.piscofins.pAliqCofins) NfsTotCofins = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.trib.tribFed.piscofins.vCofins) if NfsPerCofins.IsEmpty() and (NfsTotCofins > 0 and &TotalBaseCalculo > 0) NfsTotBasCofins = &TotalBaseCalculo NfsPerCofins = round((NfsTotCofins / &TotalBaseCalculo) * 100,4) Endif
NfsPerIR = 0 NfsTotIR = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.trib.tribFed.vRetIRRF) if NfsPerIR.IsEmpty() and (NfsTotIR > 0 and &TotalBaseCalculo > 0) NfsPerIR = round((NfsTotIR / &TotalBaseCalculo) * 100,4) Endif
NfsPerCPP = 0 NfsTotCPP = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.trib.tribFed.vRetCP) if NfsPerCPP.IsEmpty() and (NfsTotCPP > 0 and &TotalBaseCalculo > 0) NfsPerCPP = round((NfsTotCPP / &TotalBaseCalculo) * 100,4) Endif
NfsPerPIS = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.trib.tribFed.piscofins.pAliqPis) NfsTotPIS = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.trib.tribFed.piscofins.vPis) if NfsPerPIS.IsEmpty() and (NfsTotPIS > 0 and &TotalBaseCalculo > 0) NfsTotBasPIS = &TotalBaseCalculo NfsPerPIS = round((NfsTotPIS / &TotalBaseCalculo) * 100,4) Endif
// NfsPerINSS = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.AliquotaInss) // NfsTotINSS = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.trib.tribFed.) // if NfsPerINSS.IsEmpty() and (NfsTotINSS > 0 and &TotalBaseCalculo > 0) // NfsPerINSS = round((NfsTotINSS / &TotalBaseCalculo) * 100,4) // Endif
NfsPerCSLL = 0 NfsTotCSLL = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.trib.tribFed.vRetCSLL) if NfsPerCSLL.IsEmpty() and (NfsTotCSLL > 0 and &TotalBaseCalculo > 0) NfsPerCSLL = round((NfsTotCSLL / &TotalBaseCalculo) * 100,4) Endif
//NfsPerOut = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.Aliquota //NfsTotOut = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.Valor //NfsTotBasPIS = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorPis //NfsTotBasCofins = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorCofins
NfsDisSer = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.serv.cServ.xDescServ
// &NfsCNAE = &SdtNFSeItem.CodigoCnae // &NfsCnaeSer = &SdtNFSeItem.ItemListaServico NfsTribNac = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.serv.cServ.cTribNac NfsNbs = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.serv.cServ.cNBS)
&ValorLiquidoMoeda = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.vServPrest.vServ) &ValorDescontoMoeda = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.vDescCondIncond.vDescIncond) &NfsTotSer = &ValorLiquidoMoeda &NfsTotDesc = &ValorDescontoMoeda
NfsTotDesc = &NfsTotDesc NfsTotSer = &NfsTotSer NfsVlrTot = val(&SdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.valores.vLiq)
//OUTROS DADOS NfsArqXml = &tmpNfeArqXml NfsChv = &tmpNfeChv.Trim()
NfsInfComp = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.serv.infoCompl.xInfComp
NfsRetISSNov.FromString(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.trib.tribMun.tpRetISSQN) NfsCstPisCofins.FromString(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.trib.tribFed.piscofins.CST) NfsRetPisCofins.FromString(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.trib.tribFed.piscofins.tpRetPisCofins)
if &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.cStat in ('100', '101', '102', '103', '107', '108', '109') NfsSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada Endif Else NfsPerISS = &CompNFSe.Nfse.ValoresNfse.Aliquota NfsTotISS = &CompNFSe.Nfse.ValoresNfse.ValorIss
&TotalBaseCalculo = &CompNFSe.Nfse.ValoresNfse.BaseCalculo
NfsPerCofins = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.AliquotaCofins) NfsTotCofins = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorCofins) if NfsPerCofins.IsEmpty() and (NfsTotCofins > 0 and &TotalBaseCalculo > 0) NfsTotBasCofins = &TotalBaseCalculo NfsPerCofins = round((NfsTotCofins / &TotalBaseCalculo) * 100,4) Endif
NfsPerIR = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.AliquotaIr) NfsTotIR = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorIr) if NfsPerIR.IsEmpty() and (NfsTotIR > 0 and &TotalBaseCalculo > 0) NfsPerIR = round((NfsTotIR / &TotalBaseCalculo) * 100,4) Endif
NfsPerCPP = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.AliquotaCpp) NfsTotCPP = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorCpp) if NfsPerCPP.IsEmpty() and (NfsTotCPP > 0 and &TotalBaseCalculo > 0) NfsPerCPP = round((NfsTotCPP / &TotalBaseCalculo) * 100,4) Endif
NfsPerPIS = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.AliquotaPis) NfsTotPIS = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorPis) if NfsPerPIS.IsEmpty() and (NfsTotPIS > 0 and &TotalBaseCalculo > 0) NfsTotBasPIS = &TotalBaseCalculo NfsPerPIS = round((NfsTotPIS / &TotalBaseCalculo) * 100,4) Endif
NfsPerINSS = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.AliquotaInss) NfsTotINSS = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.valorInss) if NfsPerINSS.IsEmpty() and (NfsTotINSS > 0 and &TotalBaseCalculo > 0) NfsPerINSS = round((NfsTotINSS / &TotalBaseCalculo) * 100,4) Endif
NfsPerCSLL = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.AliquotaCsll) NfsTotCSLL = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorCsll) if NfsPerCSLL.IsEmpty() and (NfsTotCSLL > 0 and &TotalBaseCalculo > 0) NfsPerCSLL = round((NfsTotCSLL / &TotalBaseCalculo) * 100,4) Endif
//NfsPerOut = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.Aliquota //NfsTotOut = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.Valor //NfsTotBasPIS = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorPis //NfsTotBasCofins = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorCofins
NfsDisSer = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Discriminacao //For Primeiro Item Servico For &SdtNFSeItem in &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.ListaItensServicoItem
if &NfsCNAE.IsEmpty() &NfsCNAE = &SdtNFSeItem.CodigoCnae &NfsCnaeSer = &SdtNFSeItem.ItemListaServico Endif
&ValorLiquidoMoeda = val(&SdtNFSeItem.ValorLiquido) &ValorDescontoMoeda = val(&SdtNFSeItem.ValorDesconto)
&NfsTotSer += &ValorLiquidoMoeda &NfsTotDesc += &ValorDescontoMoeda EndFor
NfsCNAE = &NfsCNAE NfsCnaeSer = &NfsCnaeSer if &tmpNfeProTer = Nota_proPriaTerceira.PROPRIA //NOTA PROPRIA, CADASTRA CNAE CASO NAO TENHA GravaCnaeNovoProprio.Call(&EmpCod, &NfsCNAE, &NfsCnaeSer, &tmpNfeFatFilCod, &CompNFSe.Nfse.ValoresNfse.Aliquota) Endif
NfsTotDesc = &NfsTotDesc NfsTotSer = &NfsTotSer NfsVlrTot = NfsTotSer - NfsTotDesc
//OUTROS DADOS NfsArqXml = &tmpNfeArqXml NfsChv = &tmpNfeChv.Trim()
Do Case Case &CompNfse.NfseCancelamento.CodigoCancelamento = '2' or &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Rps.Status = '2' NfsSts = Status_NFe.Cancelada
Case not &CompNfse.Nfse.CodigoVerificacao.IsEmpty() NfsSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada EndCAse Endif EndNew
commit Else For Each Order tmpNFeCod Where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNfeCod
&tmpNfeFatFilCod = tmpNfeFatFilCod &tmpNfeArqXml = tmpNfeArqXml &tmpLctCod = tmpLctCod &tmpImpEntSai = tmpImpEntSai &tmpNfeNum = tmpNfeNum &tmpNfeProTer = tmpNfeProTer &tmpNfeDtaEms = tmpNfeDtaEms &tmpNfeDtaDsp = tmpNfeDtaDsp &tmpEmixCod = tmpEmixCod &tmpEmixNom = tmpEmixNom &tmpDestxCod = tmpDestxCod &tmpDestxNom = tmpDestxNom &tmpNfeChv = tmpNfeChv
tmpStsNF = 'S' Exit EndFor
LeituraXmlNFSeNacional.Call(&tmpNfeArqXml, '', &OutXmlCompNFse_LongVarchar) &sdtNFSeNacional.FromXml(&OutXmlCompNFse_LongVarchar) &NfsNum = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.nDFSe) if &NfsNum <= 0 //NFSe Nacional Valida LeituraXmlNFSe.Call(&tmpNfeArqXml, '', &OutXmlCompNFse_LongVarchar, &IsGravar) &CompNFSe.FromXml(&OutXmlCompNFse_LongVarchar) Endif
&NfsCod = &parNfsCod
For Each Order EmpCod, NfsCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where NfsCod = &NfsCod
//Nfspedcod NfsNum = &tmpNfeNum
NfsFilCod = &tmpNfeFatFilCod //Nfsser
NfsSts = Status_NFe.Digitando NfsProTer = &tmpNfeProTer
NfsPedCod = &NfsPedCod NfsPedFilCod = &NfsPedFilCod NfsDtaEms = &tmpNfeDtaEms NfsDtaFat = &tmpNfeDtaDsp
NfsLctCod = &tmpLctCod If &tmpImpEntSai = '1' NfsEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida Else NfsEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada EndIF
//DESTINATARIO if &tmpNfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS NfsCliCod = &tmpEmixCod NfsCliRaz = &tmpEmixNom.Trim()
if &NFsTipNF = 'S' &NfeCliCpf = &SdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.emit.CPF validaCpfCnpj.Call(&NfeCliCpf, &Erro, 'N') NfsCliCPF = &NfeCliCpf
&NfeCliCnpj = &SdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.emit.CNPJ validaCpfCnpj.Call(&NfeCliCnpj, &Erro, 'N') NfsCliCnpj = &NfeCliCnpj
if NfsCliCnpj.IsEmpty() NfsCliTipPes = TipoPessoa.FISICA Else NfsCliTipPes = TipoPessoa.JURIDICA EndIF
NfsCliFonNum = &SdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.emit.fone NfsCliInsMun = &SdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.emit.IM
NfsCliLog = &SdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.emit.enderNac.xLgr NfsCliNro = &SdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.emit.enderNac.nro NfsCliBai = &SdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.emit.enderNac.xBairro NfsCliCep = &SdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.emit.enderNac.CEP
&NfsCliCidCod = 0 &CidIbge = val(&SdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.emit.enderNac.cMun) do 'loadCidade' NfsCliCidCod = &NfsCliCidCod
NfsCliCidIbge = &CidIbge NfsCliCidNom = &NfsCliCidNom //PedCliEntCidNom NfsCliCidUfCod = &NfsCliCidUF Endif
Else if &NFsTipNF = 'S' NfsCliCod = &tmpDestxCod NfsCliRaz = &tmpDestxNom.Trim()
&NfeCliCpf = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.dpS.infDPS.toma.CPF validaCpfCnpj.Call(&NfeCliCpf, &Erro, 'N') NfsCliCPF = &NfeCliCpf
&NfeCliCnpj = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.dpS.infDPS.toma.CNPJ validaCpfCnpj.Call(&NfeCliCnpj, &Erro, 'N') NfsCliCnpj = &NfeCliCnpj
if NfsCliCnpj.IsEmpty() NfsCliTipPes = TipoPessoa.FISICA Else NfsCliTipPes = TipoPessoa.JURIDICA EndIF
NfsCliFonNum = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.dpS.infDPS.toma.fone //NfsCliInsEst = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.InscricaoEstadual NfsCliInsMun = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.dpS.infDPS.toma.IM
NfsCliLog = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.dpS.infDPS.toma.end.xLgr NfsCliNro = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.dpS.infDPS.toma.end.nro NfsCliBai = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.dpS.infDPS.toma.end.xBairro NfsCliCep = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.dpS.infDPS.toma.end.endNac.CEP
&NfsCliCidCod = 0 &CidIbge = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.dpS.infDPS.toma.end.endNac.cMun) do 'loadCidade' NfsCliCidCod = &NfsCliCidCod
NfsCliCidIbge = &CidIbge NfsCliCidNom = &NfsCliCidNom //PedCliEntCidNom NfsCliCidUfCod = &NfsCliCidUF Else NfsCliCod = &tmpDestxCod NfsCliRaz = &tmpDestxNom.Trim()
&NfeCliCpf = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.IdentificacaoTomador.CpfCnpj.Cpf validaCpfCnpj.Call(&NfeCliCpf, &Erro, 'N') NfsCliCPF = &NfeCliCpf
&NfeCliCnpj = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.IdentificacaoTomador.CpfCnpj.CNPJ validaCpfCnpj.Call(&NfeCliCnpj, &Erro, 'N') NfsCliCnpj = &NfeCliCnpj
if NfsCliCnpj.IsEmpty() NfsCliTipPes = TipoPessoa.FISICA Else NfsCliTipPes = TipoPessoa.JURIDICA EndIF
NfsCliFonNum = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.Contato.Telefone NfsCliInsEst = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.InscricaoEstadual
NfsCliLog = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.Endereco.Endereco.ToUpper() NfsCliNro = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.Endereco.Numero.ToUpper() NfsCliBai = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.Endereco.Bairro.ToUpper() NfsCliCep = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.Endereco.Cep.ToUpper()
&NfsCliCidCod = 0 &CidIbge = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.Endereco.CodigoMunicipio) do 'loadCidade' NfsCliCidCod = &NfsCliCidCod
NfsCliCidIbge = &CidIbge NfsCliCidNom = &NfsCliCidNom //PedCliEntCidNom NfsCliCidUfCod = &NfsCliCidUF Endif EndIF
if &NFsTipNF = 'S'
NfsPerISS = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.valores.pAliqAplic) NfsTotISS = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.valores.vISSQN)
&ServicoMoeda = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.vServPrest.vServ) &DescontoMoeda = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.vDescCondIncond.vDescIncond) &TotalBaseCalculo = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.valores.vBC)
NfsPerCofins = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.trib.tribFed.piscofins.pAliqCofins) NfsTotCofins = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.trib.tribFed.piscofins.vCofins) if NfsPerCofins.IsEmpty() and (NfsTotCofins > 0 and &TotalBaseCalculo > 0) NfsTotBasCofins = &TotalBaseCalculo NfsPerCofins = round((NfsTotCofins / &TotalBaseCalculo) * 100,4) Endif
NfsPerIR = 0 NfsTotIR = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.trib.tribFed.vRetIRRF) if NfsPerIR.IsEmpty() and (NfsTotIR > 0 and &TotalBaseCalculo > 0) NfsPerIR = round((NfsTotIR / &TotalBaseCalculo) * 100,4) Endif
NfsPerCPP = 0 NfsTotCPP = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.trib.tribFed.vRetCP) if NfsPerCPP.IsEmpty() and (NfsTotCPP > 0 and &TotalBaseCalculo > 0) NfsPerCPP = round((NfsTotCPP / &TotalBaseCalculo) * 100,4) Endif
NfsPerPIS = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.trib.tribFed.piscofins.pAliqPis) NfsTotPIS = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.trib.tribFed.piscofins.vPis) if NfsPerPIS.IsEmpty() and (NfsTotPIS > 0 and &TotalBaseCalculo > 0) NfsTotBasPIS = &TotalBaseCalculo NfsPerPIS = round((NfsTotPIS / &TotalBaseCalculo) * 100,4) Endif
// NfsPerINSS = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.AliquotaInss) // NfsTotINSS = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.trib.tribFed.) // if NfsPerINSS.IsEmpty() and (NfsTotINSS > 0 and &TotalBaseCalculo > 0) // NfsPerINSS = round((NfsTotINSS / &TotalBaseCalculo) * 100,4) // Endif
NfsPerCSLL = 0 NfsTotCSLL = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.trib.tribFed.vRetCSLL) if NfsPerCSLL.IsEmpty() and (NfsTotCSLL > 0 and &TotalBaseCalculo > 0) NfsPerCSLL = round((NfsTotCSLL / &TotalBaseCalculo) * 100,4) Endif
//NfsPerOut = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.Aliquota //NfsTotOut = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.Valor //NfsTotBasPIS = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorPis //NfsTotBasCofins = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorCofins
NfsDisSer = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.serv.cServ.xDescServ
// &NfsCNAE = &SdtNFSeItem.CodigoCnae // &NfsCnaeSer = &SdtNFSeItem.ItemListaServico NfsTribNac = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.serv.cServ.cTribNac NfsNbs = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.serv.cServ.cNBS)
&ValorLiquidoMoeda = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.vServPrest.vServ) &ValorDescontoMoeda = val(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.vDescCondIncond.vDescIncond) &NfsTotSer = &ValorLiquidoMoeda &NfsTotDesc = &ValorDescontoMoeda
NfsTotDesc = &NfsTotDesc NfsTotSer = &NfsTotSer NfsVlrTot = val(&SdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.valores.vLiq)
NfsInfComp = &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.serv.infoCompl.xInfComp
NfsRetISSNov.FromString(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.trib.tribMun.tpRetISSQN) NfsCstPisCofins.FromString(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.trib.tribFed.piscofins.CST) NfsRetPisCofins.FromString(&sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.DPS.infDPS.valores.trib.tribFed.piscofins.tpRetPisCofins)
//OUTROS DADOS NfsArqXml = &tmpNfeArqXml NfsChv = &tmpNfeChv.Trim()
if &sdtNFSeNacional.infNFSe.cStat in ('100', '101', '102', '103', '107', '108', '109') NfsSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada Endif Else NfsPerISS = &CompNFSe.Nfse.ValoresNfse.Aliquota NfsTotISS = &CompNFSe.Nfse.ValoresNfse.ValorIss
&TotalBaseCalculo = &CompNFSe.Nfse.ValoresNfse.BaseCalculo
NfsPerCofins = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.AliquotaCofins) NfsTotCofins = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorCofins) if NfsPerCofins.IsEmpty() and (NfsTotCofins > 0 and &TotalBaseCalculo > 0) NfsTotBasCofins = &TotalBaseCalculo NfsPerCofins = round((NfsTotCofins / &TotalBaseCalculo) * 100,4) Endif
NfsPerIR = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.AliquotaIr) NfsTotIR = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorIr) if NfsPerIR.IsEmpty() and (NfsTotIR > 0 and &TotalBaseCalculo > 0) NfsPerIR = round((NfsTotIR / &TotalBaseCalculo) * 100,4) Endif
NfsPerCPP = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.AliquotaCpp) NfsTotCPP = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorCpp) if NfsPerCPP.IsEmpty() and (NfsTotCPP > 0 and &TotalBaseCalculo > 0) NfsPerCPP = round((NfsTotCPP / &TotalBaseCalculo) * 100,4) Endif
NfsPerPIS = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.AliquotaPis) NfsTotPIS = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorPis) if NfsPerPIS.IsEmpty() and (NfsTotPIS > 0 and &TotalBaseCalculo > 0) NfsTotBasPIS = &TotalBaseCalculo NfsPerPIS = round((NfsTotPIS / &TotalBaseCalculo) * 100,4) Endif
NfsPerINSS = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.AliquotaInss) NfsTotINSS = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.valorInss) if NfsPerINSS.IsEmpty() and (NfsTotINSS > 0 and &TotalBaseCalculo > 0) NfsPerINSS = round((NfsTotINSS / &TotalBaseCalculo) * 100,4) Endif
NfsPerCSLL = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.AliquotaCsll) NfsTotCSLL = val(&CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorCsll) if NfsPerCSLL.IsEmpty() and (NfsTotCSLL > 0 and &TotalBaseCalculo > 0) NfsPerCSLL = round((NfsTotCSLL / &TotalBaseCalculo) * 100,4) Endif
//NfsPerOut = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.Aliquota //NfsTotOut = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.Valor //NfsTotBasPIS = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorPis //NfsTotBasCofins = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorCofins
NfsDisSer = &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Discriminacao //For Primeiro Item Servico For &SdtNFSeItem in &CompNFSe.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.ListaItensServicoItem
if &NfsCNAE.IsEmpty() &NfsCNAE = &SdtNFSeItem.CodigoCnae &NfsCnaeSer = &SdtNFSeItem.ItemListaServico Endif
&ValorLiquidoMoeda = val(&SdtNFSeItem.ValorLiquido) &ValorDescontoMoeda = val(&SdtNFSeItem.ValorDesconto)
&NfsTotSer += &ValorLiquidoMoeda &NfsTotDesc += &ValorDescontoMoeda EndFor
NfsCNAE = &NfsCNAE NfsCnaeSer = &NfsCnaeSer if &tmpNfeProTer = Nota_proPriaTerceira.PROPRIA //NOTA PROPRIA, CADASTRA CNAE CASO NAO TENHA GravaCnaeNovoProprio.Call(&EmpCod, &NfsCNAE, &NfsCnaeSer, &tmpNfeFatFilCod, &CompNFSe.Nfse.ValoresNfse.Aliquota) Endif
NfsTotDesc = &NfsTotDesc NfsTotSer = &NfsTotSer NfsVlrTot = NfsTotSer-NfsTotDesc
//OUTROS DADOS NfsArqXml = &tmpNfeArqXml NfsChv = &tmpNfeChv.Trim()
Do Case Case &CompNfse.NfseCancelamento.CodigoCancelamento = '2' or &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Rps.Status = '2' NfsSts = Status_NFe.Cancelada
Case not &CompNfse.Nfse.CodigoVerificacao.IsEmpty() NfsSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada EndCAse Endif
Exit EndFor
Commit
//REMOVE ITENS For Each Order EmpCod, NfsCod, NfsItmCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where NfsCod = &NfsCod Delete EndFor
Commit EndIf
//ATUALIZA ITENS For Each Order tmpNFeCod, tmpNfeItmCod Where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNfeCod
New EmpCod = &EmpCod NfsCod = &NfsCod NfsItmCod = tmpNfeItmCod NfsItmProCod = tmpProCod NfsItmProGraCod = tmpProGraCod NfsItmProNom = tmpProNom
NfsItmQtd = tmpPedQtd NfsItmValUnt = tmpPedVlrUnt NfsItmValTot = tmpPedVlrTot NfsItmDesc = tmpPedVlrDsc EndNew EndFor
commit
Sub 'loadCidade' for Each Order EmpCod, CidIBGE where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CidIBGE = &CidIbge
&NfsCliCidCod = CidCod &NfsCliCidNom = CidNom &NfsCliCidUF = UfeCod Exit EndFor EndSub
